session.name: v0.9.0 floor-first batch — ComfyUI v0.26.0 bump + MPI-149 kornia pin fix; umbrella plan (MPI-150) created

goal.original: Plan + execute the v0.9.0 Pod image-rebuild batch (MPI-145 sage + MPI-146 VRAM + MPI-139 v0.26.0). User REORDERED to floor-first: bump ComfyUI v0.26.0 FIRST, then perf on the stable floor.
goal.summary: ComfyUI v0.26.0 bumped in-repo (node_lock + system_dependencies) and VERIFIED locally — i2v + audio-input + Wan all generate clean on the user's RTX 4060 Ti. MPI-149 (kornia pin dropped on engine-upgrade path → LTXVideo breaks) ROOT-CAUSED + FIXED (code-verified, live-verify pending). Backlog reorganized into a 3-cluster umbrella plan (MPI-150) with a file-conflict matrix. Next session continues the umbrella: finish Cluster A (Build A + perf), then Cluster B, then C.

completed: MPI-139 Phase 1: bumped dev_configs/node_lock.json core v0.25.1→v0.26.0 (commit f6c162ddcfbd7eefb39c06fe5b8d4c46e8d09f40), frontend 1.45.15→1.45.19, templates 0.10.0→0.10.3; bumped dev_configs/system_dependencies.json engine 0.25.1→0.26.0 (global bump: local + Pod). release:check PASSED.

v0.26.0 release + local diff reviewed: LTX nodes have NO API renames (safe); #14459 node-loading change is a no-op indent (safe); kornia must stay 0.8.2 (v0.26 ships kornia>=0.7.1 unpinned); #14577/#14594 = memory-mgr change (dynamic vram + native fp8) — input for MPI-146.
8 baked node requirements desk-checked vs v0.26: none pin comfyui/comfy-kitchen; no node blocks the build.

comfy-kitchen 'errors' RESOLVED as benign (MPI-131 reply, coordination thread closed) — it's a clean capability probe, guilt-by-association with the MPI-144 OOM. comfy-kitchen==0.2.10 is pinned identically in 0.25.1 AND 0.26.0.
LOCAL v0.26 upgrade ran + VERIFIED: i2v ✅ + audio-input ✅ + Wan ✅ all gen clean. Custom root G:\CubricModels preserved.

MPI-149 FIXED: routes/downloadManager.js _createDepJob (lines 163-164) now carries pipPins + installRequirementsCommand through to the runtime depJob. Code-verified (file loads, LTXVideo DEP has pipPins:['kornia==0.8.2'], chain whole). Dev box manually patched to kornia 0.8.2 (pad OK) so LTX works now.
Umbrella plan MPI-150 created: 3 clusters (A Pod-batch / B download-stack / C LTX-authoring) + file-conflict matrix. Trimmed out 71/69/126/137 per user.
Logged gotcha: LTX cold-vs-warm load time (cold ~60s, warm ~35-40s, sampling identical) — explains why better Pod cards feel slower (storage-bandwidth-bound model load, not compute).
Created cards: MPI-148 (Builder image v0.26 bump, deferred), MPI-149 (the kornia fix), MPI-150 (umbrella).
pending: MPI-149 LIVE VERIFY: confirm on the next real engine upgrade that the log shows `pip pins installed for ComfyUI-LTXVideo: kornia==0.8.2` and kornia ends at 0.8.2 (pad OK). Then move MPI-149 to done.

Cluster A remaining: MPI-139 Phase 1.5 (Krea2 + Boogu-Image model defs), then Build A (bump app routes/remoteProxy.js POD_IMAGE_VERSION v0.8.1→v0.9.0, build image cu124+cpu CI / cu128 local via build-pod-image, verify on a fresh v0.26 Pod = the stability gate), then Phase 2 (MPI-145 bake sage + MPI-146 per-card VRAM → Build B v0.10.0).
Cluster B (after A commits — shares downloadManager.js + wrapper.py): MPI-129 R2 → MPI-140 progress-lie + MPI-136 stall-watchdog (together) → MPI-135 investigate.
Cluster C (independent): MPI-128 LTX dual-latent staging + MPI-147 LTX status-bar progress.
COMMIT: this session's changes are uncommitted (user said handoff + new session; commit via mpi-end-session when ready). RunPod branch only — NO master merge / GitHub release / git tag.

docs/gotchas.md candidate (post Build A): 'ComfyUI v0.26 ships kornia>=0.7.1 unpinned → keep 0.8.2 pin; v0.26 moved node sys-path loading (#14459, benign) + memory mgr (#14577 dynamic-vram + native fp8 #14594) — retune VRAM (MPI-146) on the new mgr.'
mpi-end-session must commit this session's files (RunPod branch, explicit pathspec — shared tree).

next_action.description: Continue the umbrella plan (MPI-150). MPI-149 is fixed + code-verified (live-verify it on the next engine upgrade). Resume Cluster A: MPI-139 Phase 1.5 (author Krea2 + Boogu-Image model defs in js/data/modelConstants/dependencies.js + models.js), then Build A (bump routes/remoteProxy.js POD_IMAGE_VERSION→v0.9.0 + build via build-pod-image, verify on a fresh v0.26 Pod). Read MPI-150 plan.md + MPI-139 plan.md first.

key_decisions: FLOOR-FIRST reorder (user): bump ComfyUI v0.26.0 BEFORE the sage/VRAM perf work — v0.26 changes the memory manager (#14577/#14594) and node loading the perf fixes sit on, so tuning then bumping = wasted. Two builds: Build A = v0.26 floor (v0.9.0), Build B = sage+VRAM (v0.10.0).
MPI-139 (v0.26) split FROM the original v0.9.0 sage/VRAM batch; MPI-145/146 are now Phase 2 on the stable floor. MPI-139 owns the batch plan.
MPI-149 folded into the v0.26 floor as a blocker (not standalone) — it breaks LTXVideo for any user who updates the engine.
Backlog → 3-cluster umbrella (MPI-150) run cluster-by-cluster with handoffs, NOT separate agents on interrelated cards. Trimmed 71/69/126/137 out of scope.
Global ComfyUI bump = local portable + Pod (both via the repo). User's separate G-drive ComfyUI install is THEIR manual update (outside repo, not agent-editable).
comfy-kitchen confirmed a non-issue (benign probe) — do not re-investigate.
constraints: RunPod branch only — NO master merge, NO GitHub release, NO git tag (MPI-131 rule) until the public master release lands.
Shared git tree — commit by explicit pathspec (git commit --only <paths>), never git add -A/. Push is user-authorized only.

Edit mpi-ci with `git -C c:/AI/Mpi/mpi-ci` (SEPARATE repo). Image build scripts live in c:\AI\Mpi\mpi-ci\cubric-vision-pod\ (product) + cubric-vision-builder\ (authoring). Pod ops + image builds are USER-GATED live ops (build-pod-image; cu128 LOCAL-only, cu124+cpu via CI). A POD_IMAGE_VERSION bump needs an app restart + a FRESH Pod.
node_lock.json (dev_configs) is the single source for ComfyUI core+frontend+node pins; the Pod build copies it + the app imports it. v0.26.0 commit = f6c162ddcfbd7eefb39c06fe5b8d4c46e8d09f40.
kornia stays pinned 0.8.2 (LTXVideo pyramid.pad import; v0.26 still needs it — LTXVideo HEAD is our pinned commit, PR #516 not merged). MPI-149 makes the pin re-fire on upgrade.

FILE-CONFLICT MATRIX (MPI-150 plan.md): Cluster A must fully ship+commit before Cluster B (share downloadManager.js + wrapper.py + dependencies.js + remoteProxy.js). MPI-129 is upstream of 140/136. C is independent.

LTX model-load slowness is storage-bandwidth-bound (cold ~60s vs warm ~35-40s; sampling identical) — bigger on Pod network-SSD even with better cards. NOT a Pod-compute bug (logged in docs/gotchas.md).

Don't read/grep .secrets/runpod.env. On a Pod never pkill main.py (cascades) — use /wrapper/restart-comfy. Editing a live Pod's wrapper.py doesn't take effect (in-memory _build_cmd); only a rebuild/fresh Pod applies it.
files_modified: routes/downloadManager.js (_createDepJob carries pipPins + installRequirementsCommand — MPI-149 fix)
.agents/mpi-kanban/tasks/MPI-148/ (Builder bump card), MPI-149/ (kornia fix card + research + validation), MPI-150/ (umbrella card + plan)
